license_compliance: LICENSE is shipped verbatim (Apache-2.0 §4a). Video.js 8 does NOT ship an upstream NOTICE file at github.com/videojs/video.js/blob/main/NOTICE — Apache-2.0 §4d only requires NOTICE if upstream ships one, so this absence is best-effort compliance, not a gap.
notice: These files are vendored under Video.js's Apache-2.0 license. See assets/vendor/videojs/LICENSE for the full text. Vendoring keeps the repo npm-free per Phase 0-A 2026-06-21.
drift_check: tools/validate.mjs recomputes SHA-256 of every entry below and fails the run if any byte count or hash differs. Pin a new version by editing both 'version' fields and the matching sha256 below.
